title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 26.540 - Plans limited to certain matters
text:
26.540.  Plans limited to certain matters. — Reorganization plans shall relate only to abolishing or combining agencies in the executive branch of the state government or to changing the organization thereof or the assignment of functions thereto.  Each plan shall contain such provisions as are necessary to assure the uninterrupted conduct of the governmental services and functions affected by the proposed reorganization plan.
(L. 1967 p. 98 § 5)
